title: Q3 Product Review
body:
Meeting Minutes: Q3 Product Review

Date: 2026-08-01
Attendees: Alice Chen, Bob Patel, Carol Davis

Agenda:
1. Review Q2 product metrics
2. Discuss Q3 priorities
3. Action items

Discussion:
- Alice presented Q2 metrics, showing 15% growth in user engagement.
- Bob shared customer feedback trends, highlighting a need for better onboarding.
- The team agreed to focus on roadmap updates and customer interviews in Q3.

Action Items:
1. Alice Chen to draft updated roadmap (due 2026-08-15)
2. Bob Patel to schedule customer interviews (due 2026-08-22)

No unresolved discussion items.
